papers.title: PlantGFM: A Genomic Foundation Model for Discovery and Creation of Plant Genes.
papers.abstract: PlantGFM is a genomic foundation model for plant genes and gene discovery across plant genomes.

papers.title: PlantBiMoE: A Bidirectional Foundation Model with SparseMoE for Plant Genomes
papers.abstract: PlantBiMoE is a foundation model using SparseMoE for plant genomes and genomic sequence modeling.

papers.title: Genomic language models with k-mer tokenization strategies for plant genome annotation and regulatory element strength prediction
papers.abstract: Genomic language models and transformer models improve plant genome annotation and regulatory element strength prediction.

papers.title: A conversational multi-agent AI system for automated plant phenotyping.
papers.abstract: A conversational multi-agent AI system supports image-based plant phenotyping but does not model plant genomes.

papers.title: Regulatory architecture of high-altitude adaptation in Artemisia: from signal perception to specialized metabolism.
papers.abstract: This plant adaptation review discusses genomic, physiological, metabolic, and architectural levels.

papers.title: From pollen precursor to totipotent embryo: a model system for plant cell developmental plasticity.
papers.abstract: A plant developmental system for pollen and embryo biology.

papers.title: Genome-wide association studies of a pea germplasm reveal novel markers and candidate genes implicated in resistance.
papers.abstract: A plant genomics and breeding study with genes, markers, and variants.
